item.title: security/ directory and posture.yaml created without secure modes — container hardening config world-readable
item.intent: The security/ directory and posture.yaml must be created with mode 0700/0600 — container hardening configuration must not be readable by other users.
item.description: src/build/docker/posture-writer.ts line 101 calls mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }) without mode when creating the security/ directory. Line 104 calls writeFileSync(path, content, 'utf-8') without mode for posture.yaml. The security/ directory stores posture.yaml which reveals: dropped capabilities, security options (seccomp, apparmor), read-only rootfs, container user, ICC disabled status, and resource limits. An attacker can use this information to identify hardening gaps and tailor exploits. Note: scaffold.ts creates security/ with DIR_MODE_SECRET, but posture-writer creates it independently if it doesn't exist (line 100 checks existsSync). Fix: add chmodSync, to fs imports; import DIR_MODE_SECRET, FILE_MODE_SECRET from config/defaults.js; add mode: DIR_MODE_SECRET to mkdirSync at line 101; chmodSync after; change writeFileSync at line 104 to use FILE_MODE_SECRET; chmodSync after.
steps: Read src/build/docker/posture-writer.ts lines 9-11 — confirm chmodSync is not in node:fs import and no defaults import exists
Line 9: add chmodSync to the node:fs import — change to: import { chmodSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs';
After line 10 (dirname, join import): add new import line: import { DIR_MODE_SECRET, FILE_MODE_SECRET } from '../../config/defaults.js';
Line 101 (inside writePostureYaml, the if block): change mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }) to mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true, mode: DIR_MODE_SECRET });
After line 101: add chmodSync(dir, DIR_MODE_SECRET); — fixes permissions on existing installs where scaffold already created security/ at 0755
Line 104: change writeFileSync(path, content, 'utf-8') to writeFileSync(path, content, { encoding: 'utf-8', mode: FILE_MODE_SECRET });
Run: npm test -- --testPathPattern='posture' and confirm all tests pass
acceptanceCriteria: The security/ directory is created with mode 0700 when posture-writer creates it — stat confirms no group/other read bits
posture.yaml is written with mode 0600 — stat on ~/.clawhq/security/posture.yaml confirms no group/other read bits
All existing posture-writer tests pass with no regressions
